tools.name: get_exchange_rates
tools.description:
Get latest foreign exchange rates for a base currency via Frankfurter API.
    Returns: {base, date, rates: {EUR: 0.92, ...}}

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description:
Convert amount between currencies using live rates.
    Returns: {amount, from, to, rate, result}

tools.name: get_crypto_price
tools.description:
Get cryptocurrency spot price via CoinGecko (no API key).
    symbol: btc, eth, sol, etc. Returns: {symbol, id, price, currency}
